GOLDEN_BOOT: The Golden Boot award is given to the player who has scored most goals. If more than one player is tied, ties are broken by other criteria and the market will be settled as per official FIFA Rules
CORRECT_SCORE: Home Team refers to team listed first, Away Team refers to second team listed. Wagers based on 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count)
ALTERNATIVE_HANDICAPS: Goals are either added to or subtracted from a team. For example if you back Team A (-1), they have to win by 2 goals, winning by 1 will see Handicap Draw settled as winner. 90 mins + added time only
FIRST_HALF_HANDICAP: Goals are either added to or subtracted from a team. For example if you back Team A (-1), they have to win by 2 goals, winning by 1 will see Handicap Draw settled as winner.
DOUBLE_CHANCE: You're betting on two results out of a possible three. For example if you bet on 'Team A and Draw', then you win the bet if Team A wins, or if it's a draw.
DRAW_NO_BET: You're betting on a team to win, but if it ends a draw we'll give you back your stake. Wagers based on 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count)
HALF-TIME/FULL-TIME: You're betting on the result at half time and full time, and you've to get them both right to win. Wagers based on 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count)
HANDICAP_BETTING: No Push. Goals are either added to or subtracted from a team. For example if you back Team A (-1), they have to win by 2 goals, winning by 1 will see Handicap Draw win. 90 mins + added time only
SECOND_HALF_HANDICAP: Goals are either added to or subtracted from a team. For example if you back Team A (-1), they have to win by 2 goals, winning by 1 will see Handicap Draw settled as winner.
WHO_WILL_KEEP_A_CLEAN_SHEET?: Team to concede 0 goals. Wagers based on 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count)
PLAYER_TO_HAVE_2_OR_MORE_ASSISTS: Settled based on OPTA definitions and data. Wagers based on 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count)
TO_SCORE: 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count). Own Goals don't count. If the player doesn't get on the pitch, stakes will be refunded
FIRST_GOAL_SCORER: 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count). Own Goals don't count. For players yet to enter the game stakes will be refunded
INSUREBET_FIRST_GOALSCORER: If the player fails to score the first goal, but does score subsequently the stake is returned. Wagers based on 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count)
TEAM_TOTAL_TOURNAMENT_GOALS: Extra-time goals included, penalty shoot-outs not included
OVER/UNDER_TOTAL_TOURNAMENT_GOALS: Extra-time goals included, penalty shoot-outs not included
ANYTIME_CORRECT_SCORE: Wagers based on 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count)
EXTRA_TIME_CORRECT_SCORE: Only includes goals scored in Extra Time, the score shall be deemed 0-0 at the start of extra time
ANYTIME_ASSIST: 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count). Own Goals don't count. If the player doesn't get on the pitch, stakes will be refunded
HIGHEST_SCORING_TEAM: Penalty shoot-outs not included. Dead Heat Rules apply.
LOWEST_SCORING_TEAM: Penalty shoot-outs not included. Dead Heat Rules apply.
HIGHEST_SCORING_GROUP: Only Group Stage goals scored count. Dead Heat Rules apply.
LOWEST_SCORING_GROUP: Only Group Stage goals scored count. Dead Heat Rules apply.
PRE_MATCH_COMBO_-_SPM_1: Goals scored in 90 minutes and extra time only, unless stated otherwise. Penalty shoot-outs not included
TOP_EUROPEAN_TEAM: Team to progress furthest from listed nations. Dead heat rules apply.
TOP_AFRICAN_TEAM: Team to progress furthest from listed nations. Dead heat rules apply.
TOP_SOUTH_AMERICAN_TEAM: Team to progress furthest from listed nations. Dead heat rules apply.
FANDUEL_SOCCER_SPECIALS: Applies only to 90 minutes plus any added time. Extra time and penalty shootouts do not count towards settlement
FANDUEL_SOCCER_SPECIALS_1: Applies only to 90 minutes plus any added time. Extra time and penalty shootouts do not count towards settlement.
FANDUEL_SOCCER_SPECIALS_2: Penalty Shootouts not included in goals/scoring props
FANDUEL_SOCCER_SPECIALS_3: Penalty Shootouts not included in goals/scoring props
FANDUEL_SOCCER_SPECIALS_4: Penalty Shootouts not included in goals/scoring props
PRE_MATCH_COMBO_-_SPM_2: Penalty Shootouts not included. Own goals, directly taken free kicks, direct corner goals and penalties do not get an assist awarded
AWAY_TEAM_MULTI_CORNERS: Multi Corners refers to number of 1st half corners multiplied by number of 2nd half corners
HOME_TEAM_MULTI_CORNERS: Multi Corners refers to number of 1st half corners multiplied by number of 2nd half corners
TO_QUALIFY_FOR_THE_NEXT_ROUND: Wager covers regulation time, extra time and penalties. Home team refers to first country listed, Away Team to second country listed
EXTRA_TIME_BETTING: Wagers based on 30 minute Extra Time period plus any injury time only (Penalty Shootouts do not count)
FANDUEL_DAILY_WC_SPECIALS: Applies only to 90 minutes plus any added time. Extra time and penalty shootouts do not count towards settlement
SECOND_GOALSCORER: 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count). Own Goals don't count. If the player doesn't get on the pitch, stakes will be refunded
THIRD_GOALSCORER: 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count). Own Goals don't count. If the player doesn't get on the pitch, stakes will be refunded
FOURTH_GOALSCORER: 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count). Own Goals don't count. For players yet to enter the game stakes will be refunded
FIFTH_GOALSCORER: 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count). Own Goals don't count. For players yet to enter the game stakes will be refunded
SIXTH_GOALSCORER: 90 minutes plus any injury time only (Extra Time and Penalty Shootouts do not count). Own Goals don't count. For players yet to enter the game stakes will be refunded
TO_LIFT_THE_CUP: Wager covers regulation time, extra time and penalties. Home team refers to first country listed, Away Team to second country listed
TO_FINISH_THIRD: Wager covers regulation time, extra time and penalties. Home team refers to first country listed, Away Team to second country listed
METHOD_OF_VICTORY: All-In market: All bets are actioned regardless of if the match finishes in regular time or progresses to Extra-Time/Penalties.
FULL_TIME_RESULT_-_2_UP: Your bet will be paid out in full if your team is winning by 2 goals in 90 mins plus stoppage time regardless if your selection goes on to draw or lose the game
If your selection is leading by two goals and goes on to win the match your bet will not be paid as a winner twice
TO_SCORE_OR_ASSIST_INCLUDING_EXTRA_TIME: Applies to 90 minutes plus injury time and any required extra time periods. Does not apply to goals scored in penalty shootouts.
ANYTIME_ASSIST_INCLUDING_EXTRA_TIME: Applies to 90 minutes plus injury time and any required extra time periods. Does not apply to goals scored in penalty shootouts.
NUMBER_OF_CORNERS: No pushes. Exact corner totals are settled as losing bets.
NEXT_GOAL_METHOD:
90 minutes + stoppage time only.
Extra Time not included.
NEXT_PLAYER_TOTAL_SHOT:
90 minutes + stoppage time only.
Extra Time not included.
NEXT_PLAYER_SHOT_ON_TARGET:
90 minutes + stoppage time only.
Extra Time not included.
NEXT_SET_PIECE:
90 minutes + stoppage time only.
Extra Time not included.
PLAYER_PENALTY_SCORE_-_FANDUEL: Void if player does not take a penalty.
